codecheck 0.25.0.9000

  • Changelog

Regenerate all stats.json files from existing register.json files

Source: R/register.R
register_update_stats.Rd

Fast alternative to a full re-render when only the stats computation has changed. Reads the already-generated register.json files under `docs/` and rewrites every stats.json with up-to-date statistics (including annual and cumulative breakdowns).

Usage

register_update_stats(
  docs_dir = "docs",
  config = system.file("extdata", "config.R", package = "codecheck")
)

Arguments

docs_dir

Path to the docs output directory (default: "docs")

config

Path to the config.R file

Author

Daniel Nuest

On this page

Developed by Stephen Eglen, Daniel Nuest, Angelina Momin, Sam Langton.
